features: 【HYDRATING＆BRIGHTENING MOISTURIZER】- Turmeric vitamin c face cream helps lighten skin dullness and revive natural health complexion. SHVYOG Vitamin c moisturizer keeps skin moisturizing and protect your skin, also increase collagen metabolism. The brightening cream is easy to push away and fast absorption makes skin brightening without stripping away natural moisture.

【ANTI-AGING＆FIRMING FACE CREAM】- This amazing anti-aging turmeric face cream helps skin cells rejuvenate and increase produce collagen. It's a powerful antioxidant for reduce dark spots, wrinkles and fine lines. Turmeric effectively improves the appearance of dry and aging skin and supports firm, youthful looking skin. Vitamin c helps lock the moisture give a youthful, glowing, smoothing skin to you.

【TOP GRADE NATURAL INGREDIENTS】- Our vitamin c brightening cream is infused with rich vitamin c, turmeric and other plants extract. Vitamin c helps brighten dull skin and effectively prevent pigmentation. Organic turmeric has powerful anti-aging that helps skin tighter and restore elasticity. The benefit of paeonia extract and oat extract keeps skin moisturizing for long-time and improve skin texture.

【FOR ALL SKIN TYPE】- SHVYOG vitamin c lightening cream suitable for all skin types including dry, oil, sensitive and combination skin with natural ingredients that brings skin non-irritating and smoothing. High quality vitamin c cream with no parabens and no cruelty.

【PERFECT AFTER SALES】- We will do our best to meet your needs. If you are not satisfied with our turmeric vitamin c moisturizer for any reason, we will solve it for you as soon as possible, please feel free to contact us. We aim to provide you with a perfect online shopping experience.
description: Product Description SHVYOG VITAMIN C FACE CREAM WITH TURMERIC FOR SKIN CARE Turmeric vitamin c face cream has powerful effects for anti-aging and brightening. Turmeric helps skin rejuvenate and effectively improves skin firm, and vitamin c keeps skin moisturizing and maks skin more glowing. VITAMIN C MOISTURIZER FOR FACE HELPS ANTI-AGING, LIGHTING WRINKLES AND ILLUMINATE It helps moisturizing and hydrating. It helps lighten dullnees skin. It helps smoothing skin and even skin tone. It helps reduces skin fine lines, wrinkles and dark spots. SUPER HYDRATION VITAMIN C LOTION MAKES SKIN LOOKING RADIANT NATURAL INGREDIENTS WITH HIGH QUALITY ✔ VITAMIN C ✔ TURMERIC ✔ NIACINAMIDE ✔ OAT EXTRACT ✔ PEONIA EXTRACT VITAMIN C TURMERIC BRIGHTENING CREAM FOR SMOOTH SKIN WRINKLES AND MAKES SKIN GLOWING Regular use of our Vitamin c turmeric cream can solve many problems of the face skin. Such as dark spots, wrinkles, uneven skin tone , dullness skin. Make skin restore firm and lighting.
